name: EGC
description: Mapping glider deployers worldwide and providing tools, data management support and training opportunities for European glider operators.

name: UG2
description: A community-based coalition aimed at bolstering scientific collaboration, information, and resource sharing for gliders.

name: GOOS-OceanOPS/WMO
description: Monitoring and Supporting Global Ocean Observing Networks through coordination and development of IT tools for GOOS. World Meteorological Organization co-sponsors GOOS.
